title: pollalesta hypochlora
side_effects: Pollalesta hypochlora can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and rapid heartbeat in individuals who ingest its extracts without medical supervision. Prolonged exposure to the plant's vapors can cause respiratory issues, including coughing and shortness of breath. In rare cases, excessive use of pollalesta hypochlora can lead to skin irritation, rashes, and even an allergic reaction. If not handled correctly, the plant's toxic compounds can be absorbed through the skin, causing systemic poisoning and other severe health complications.
